title: carex nigra subsp. juncea
intro: Carex nigra subsp. juncea is a type of sedge, a perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is also known as black sedge, and its rhizomes and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex nigra subsp. juncea include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
